_note: I-2 baseline fixture — cmp-004. Strong quality output that hits all expected dimensions (quality score = 1.0). BUT confidence_score=0.35 is below the H-0 low_confidence_threshold of 0.6, which triggers SafetyStatus.ESCALATE. escalation_required=false so no escalation policy issue — only low confidence drives the safety status.
summary: The incident report identified significant quality system failures in the operational workflow.
recommendations: Initiate a CAPA process to address all identified operational gaps.
Conduct a root cause analysis within 30 days.

citations.excerpt: The incident was caused by a failure in the standard operating procedure for equipment calibration.
